name: Pink Beans with Marinated Seitan
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Pinto or light red kidney beans (16 oz each, drained and rinsed)
1/4 cup Cilantro or parsley (and seeds from red bell pepper for garnish, optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, combine seitan and tamari or soy sauce. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring frequently, until liquid is absorbed. Remove from heat.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine olive oil, lime juice, garlic, salt, pepper, and cumin. Mix well. Stir in cooked seitan. Marinate for at least 15 minutes, or cover and refrigerate overnight. Remove from refrigerator at least 1 hour before assembling the salad.
4. To assemble, place lettuce in a large serving bowl. Spread seitan mixture on top. Add beans and red bell pepper strips. Toss lightly. Garnish with parsley and red bell pepper seeds if desired. Serves 8.
5. Per serving: 295 cal; 19 g protein; 8 g fat; 50 g carbs; 0 chol; 1,053 mg sodium; 7 g fiber
